cleavage agent: digestion of samples was done with trypsin, in an enzyme to protein ratio 1:50
collision energy: The normalized collision energy of 32 was applied
fractionation method: offline high pH reverse phase fractionation was carried out
instrument: coupled directly to a QExactive plus mass spectrometer
ionization type: using the Proxeon nano-flow source in positive ion mode
labeling: Peptides were labeled with TMT10plex Isobaric Label Reagent
